final_files.tests/test_final.py:
from types import SimpleNamespace

import pytest

from mesh import settings as settings_module
from mesh.aggregator import handle_trade_context, reset_cost_state


def _children(action="hold"):
    return {"stop_eval": {"action": action}}


def _gateway_spy(calls, action="hold"):
    return lambda children: calls.append(children) or {"action": action}


def test_below_pressure_threshold_keeps_teacher_path():
    reset_cost_state()
    calls = []
    decision = handle_trade_context(
        SimpleNamespace(pending=7), {}, _children(), "bootstrap", _gateway_spy(calls)
    )
    assert decision["method"] == "teacher"
    assert len(calls) == 1


def test_zero_pressure_threshold_is_explicit_shedding_override(monkeypatch):
    reset_cost_state()
    monkeypatch.setattr(settings_module.settings, "mesh_teacher_queue_pressure_block_fraction", 0.0)
    calls = []
    decision = handle_trade_context(
        SimpleNamespace(pending=10), {}, _children(), "demoted", _gateway_spy(calls)
    )
    assert decision["method"] == "teacher"
    assert len(calls) == 1


def test_missing_database_does_not_block_teacher():
    reset_cost_state()
    calls = []
    decision = handle_trade_context(None, {}, _children(), "bootstrap", _gateway_spy(calls))
    assert decision["method"] == "teacher"
    assert len(calls) == 1


def test_queue_probe_failure_fails_open_for_teacher():
    reset_cost_state()
    calls = []
    decision = handle_trade_context(
        SimpleNamespace(pending=10, raise_on_probe=True),
        {},
        _children(),
        "bootstrap",
        _gateway_spy(calls),
    )
    assert decision["method"] == "teacher"
    assert len(calls) == 1


@pytest.mark.parametrize("stage", ["bootstrap", "demoted", "shadow", "graduated"])
def test_every_stage_preserves_mechanical_decision_under_pressure(stage):
    reset_cost_state()
    calls = []
    state = {}
    decision = handle_trade_context(
        SimpleNamespace(pending=9),
        state,
        _children("exit"),
        stage,
        _gateway_spy(calls, action="hold"),
    )
    assert calls == []
    assert decision == {"method": "mechanical", "action": "exit", "observations": 1}
    assert state["decision"] == decision
    assert "teacher_observation" not in state


def test_daily_cap_remains_effective_below_queue_threshold(monkeypatch):
    reset_cost_state()
    monkeypatch.setattr(settings_module.settings, "mesh_daily_llm_cap", 1)
    calls = []
    gateway = _gateway_spy(calls)
    first = handle_trade_context(SimpleNamespace(pending=1), {}, _children(), "bootstrap", gateway)
    second = handle_trade_context(SimpleNamespace(pending=1), {}, _children(), "bootstrap", gateway)
    assert first["method"] == "teacher"
    assert second["method"] == "mechanical"
    assert len(calls) == 1
